articles.title: Cardano Welcomes Gold-Backed Kinka Token ($XNK) with Support from EMURGO
articles.description: Cardano’s blockchain will soon feature its first major gold-backed token, Kinka Gold ($XNK), thanks to a partnership between the token’s issuer and EMURGO, a founding entity of Cardano. EMURGO is a company that plays a crucial role in the Cardano ecosystem, focusing on the commercial development and adoption of blockchain technology. It works to drive […]

articles.title: Franklin Templeton, Citigroup turn to Solana for next-gen financial services
articles.description: Global financial giants Franklin Templeton and Citigroup have announced have announced plans to adopt the Solana blockchain for their upcoming financial services. Franklin Templeton, a $1.4 trillion asset manager, plans to launch a mutual fund natively on Solana, while Wallstreet giant Citi is exploring the blockchain’s capabilities for smart contracts and cross-border money transfers. The...

articles.description: XRP Ledger (XRP) whales intensively buy millions of tokens as the cryptocurrency market shows signs of a momentary recovery. In … Continue reading

articles.title: Cardano Founder Warns Trump’s World Liberty Financial Could Politicize the Industry
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson expresses concerns over Trump’s World Liberty Financial, warning that the platform may face political opposition and regulatory scrutiny from the DoJ and SEC, threatening the cryptocurrency sector.

articles.title: Cardano tests key resistance, ready for rally if breaks above symmetrical triangle
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) price trades within a symmetrical triangle on Friday, a breakout from which could signal a rally ahead.

articles.title: Cardano Bears Stun Bulls Amid Fight for Rebound
articles.description: Cardano facing uncertainty in its push for massive rally

articles.title: Cardano Founder to Meet Argentina President – Could ADA Become Argentina’s Official Currency?
articles.description: The price of Cardano has jumped by 3.5% in the past 24 hours, with its move to $0.3591 coming as the cryptocurrency market gains by 1.5% today. articles.title: SG Forge Shifts Euro Stablecoin to Solana Following Lackluster Performance on Ethereum
articles.description: Coinspeaker SG Forge Shifts Euro Stablecoin to Solana Following Lackluster Performance on Ethereum SG Forge, a subsidiary of Societe Generale, is launching its euro-backed stablecoin, EURCV, on Solana, following its initial release on Ethereum last year. SG Forge Shifts Euro Stablecoin to Solana Following Lackluster Performance on Ethereum

articles.title: Societe Generale’s EURCV looks to Solana for stablecoin success after PayPal’s PYUSD rise
articles.description: Societe Generale is expanding its EUR CoinVertible (EURCV) MiCA-compliant stablecoin to the Solana blockchain, according to a Sept. 20 statement. This move comes more than a year after the bank’s crypto division, SG Forge, launched EURCV on the Ethereum blockchain. However, the asset has struggled to gain traction, with only 28 holders, 154 total transactions, […]

articles.title: PayPal’s José Fernández says Ethereum is not the best solution for payments
articles.description: PayPal’s Blockchain, Crypto, and Digital Currencies business unit head, José Fernández da Ponte, confirmed that the international online payment system launch on Solana was prompted by shortcomings on the Ethereum network. Fernández said Ethereum is not the best platform to offer payment solutions.

articles.title: New Clipper Malware Targets Shiba Inu Community
articles.description: A rising Clipper Malware scam is targeting the Shiba Inu community, intercepting crypto transactions and posing a significant threat to users' funds.

articles.title: Crypto Markets Face Uncertainty as $1.6 Billion
articles.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum brace for volatility as $1.6 billion in options expire, following a Federal Reserve rate cut, sparking uncertainty in the crypto market.

articles.title: Solana’s Jupiter pumps 12%, this might be the reason
articles.description: Solana based decentralized exchange aggregator, Jupiter, seems to be gone on a buying spree as the crypto bull run took a halt before entering into the next phase.
